title: Add partial_fit method to CategoricalNB
description:
sklearn CategoricalNB supports partial_fit(X, y, classes=None) for incremental learning. ferrolearn FittedCategoricalNB is missing partial_fit; the other 4 NB variants already have it.

Implementation: increment per-(class, feature, category) count tables, recompute log-probabilities. Validate that no new categories appear unless min_categories accommodates them (cf. #?? min_categories issue).
